name: Neural_OS
description: Institutional-grade RWA (Real World Asset) settlement infrastructure. AI agents pay USDC on Base per-call to access market intelligence, XRPL settlement routing, and agent hiring. No API keys — just pay.

tools.name: rwa_alpha
tools.description: Get live RWA alpha signals — top institutional opportunity scores across all supported chains.

tools.name: rwa_deep
tools.description: Deep institutional read — full portfolio composition, counterparty risk, and settlement path for a given RWA position.

tools.name: rwa_council
tools.description: Full council verdict — multi-engine AI consensus on buy/hold/sell for institutional positions.

tools.name: agents_hire
tools.description: Post an agent hire request — specify a task and budget; Neural_OS routes to the best available agent cluster.

tools.name: swarm_ping
tools.description: Register as an active swarm agent and get current network load, gas fees, and optimal execution window.

tools.name: market_sentiment
tools.description: Cross-chain market sentiment scan — aggregates AIXBT signals, on-chain flows, and social velocity.

tools.name: xrpl_settlement
tools.description: Route an XRPL settlement — optimal path selection, fee calculation, and escrow setup for cross-chain RWA delivery.
